Record Class Relic

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
fr.uge.items.Relic
Record Components:
id - Unique identifier.
relicName - The type name of the relic.
rotation - Current rotation.
cost - Resource cost to use.
shape - Grid shape.
description - Description text.
All Implemented Interfaces:
Item
public record Relic(UUID id, RelicEnum relicName, int rotation, Cost cost, List<Coordinate> shape, String description) extends Record implements Item
Represents a Relic item. Relics are powerful, unique items usually obtained from bosses. Their properties are immutable and loaded from a JSON file.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description

    Creates a new Relic based on its enum type.

    Creates an instance of a Relic record class.

  • Constructor Details

    • Relic

      public Relic(UUID id, RelicEnum relicName, int rotation, Cost cost, List<Coordinate> shape, String description)
      Creates an instance of a Relic record class.
      Parameters:
      id - the value for the id record component
      relicName - the value for the relicName record component
      rotation - the value for the rotation record component
      cost - the value for the cost record component
      shape - the value for the shape record component
      description - the value for the description record component

    • Relic

      public Relic(RelicEnum type)
      Creates a new Relic based on its enum type. Data is fetched from the loaded registry.
      Parameters:
      type - the type of the relic.

  • Method Details

    • name

      public String name()
      Description copied from interface: Item
      Returns the name of the item.
      Specified by:
      name in interface Item
      Returns:
      the name as a String.

    • rotate

      public Item rotate()
      Rotates the relic by 90 degrees. Returns a new instance since Record is immutable.
      Specified by:
      rotate in interface Item
      Returns:
      a new Relic with updated rotation.

    • size

      public List<Coordinate> size()
      Description copied from interface: Item
      Returns the list of coordinates (shape) the item occupies in the inventory grid. This shape changes based on the item's rotation.
      Specified by:
      size in interface Item
      Returns:
      a list of coordinates relative to the item's anchor (0,0).

    • rarity

      public Rarity rarity()
      Description copied from interface: Item
      Returns the rarity of the item (Common, Uncommon, Rare, Legendary, Relic).
      Specified by:
      rarity in interface Item
      Returns:
      the item's rarity.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

      Returns:

      Returns the value of the relicName record component.
